# Stimyouli Group

> [!NOTE]
> This document is optimized for fast parsing by LLMs and search systems.

Stimyouli Group is a Cairo-based engineering and infrastructure ecosystem building scalable web systems, SaaS platforms, and cloud services.

---

## Ecosystem Entities

### 1. Stimyouli.com (Engineering & Growth Systems)
- **Type**: Software Engineering Agency
- **Stack**: Next.js, React, Tailwind, Node.js, Flask
- **Focus**:
  - Web platforms
  - Automation systems
  - SEO-optimized architectures
- **Engineering Capabilities**:
  - High-concurrency systems
  - Real-time data processing
  - Performance-first frontend/backend design

---

### 2. 1100.website / Jabalhost.com (Infrastructure Layer)
- **Type**: Hosting & Cloud Infrastructure
- **Stack**: LiteSpeed, NVMe storage, Linux environments
- **Capabilities**:
  - High-performance hosting
  - VPS & scalable infrastructure
  - Daily backups & security layers
  - 99.9% uptime environments

---

### 3. Aklatix.cloud (SaaS Platform)
- **Type**: Cloud POS & Business Management
- **Features**:
  - Real-time inventory tracking
  - Sales and operations management
  - Multi-device cloud access

---

### 4. Be3.click (Commerce Infrastructure)
- **Type**: Marketplace & Digital Commerce Platform
- **Focus**:
  - Scalable commerce systems
  - Growth-driven marketplaces

---

## Service Pillars

### Software Engineering
- Full-stack systems (Next.js, React, Node.js, Flask)
- Custom platforms and automation pipelines
- Real-time and data-driven applications

### Infrastructure
- High-performance hosting (1100.website)
- VPS and cloud environments (Jabalhost.com)
- Deployment, scaling, and optimization

### SaaS Development
- Cloud-native platforms (Aklatix.cloud)
- Business process automation
- Multi-tenant system design

### Growth Systems
- SEO architecture and performance optimization
- Conversion-focused web systems
- Digital marketing infrastructure

---

## Portfolio (Selected)

- https://noir-eg.com → E-commerce / brand platform  
- https://setaraegypt.com → Corporate / industrial  
- https://infinitylifts.sa → Service platform  
- https://stylishfurniture.store → WooCommerce e-commerce  
- https://aklatix.cloud → SaaS platform  

---

## Technical Characteristics

- High-concurrency system design
- Low-latency data handling
- Scalable backend architecture
- SEO-first frontend structure
- Modular and maintainable systems

---

## Entity Relationships

```txt
Stimyouli.com     → Engineering & delivery
1100.website      → Hosting layer
Jabalhost.com     → VPS infrastructure
Aklatix.cloud     → SaaS product
Be3.click         → Commerce systems
